column2: This [GetGirlWomanBoyMan] is universally beloved. None can resist [GetHerHis] charm.
This [GetGirlWomanBoyMan] is master of vast estates, drawing immense tax revenue from [GetHerHis] lands.
This [GetGirlWomanBoyMan] is a cunning schemer. Plots succeed with ease, and [GetHerHis] enemies find themselves arrested or worse.
This [GetGirlWomanBoyMan] is a peerless military commander, mastering every facet of warfare.
This [GetGirlWomanBoyMan] can raise mighty fortresses overnight. Construction is swift and nearly free.
